title: Emberveil Art Direction (v1)
description: Per-sprite art-direction + reference sheet + per-frame provenance. Consumed by the PixelLab redesign pipeline (scripts/pixellab/*) and the Tools > PixelLab Redesign page. Never read by gameplay code — the runtime still resolves frames by filename convention under public/images/spritecook/.

spriteId.description: Matches the sprite prefix used in public/images/spritecook/{spriteId}_{pose}.png.

class.description: Drives pixel-height defaults and canvas rules.

pixelHeight.description: Target sprite height inside the 256x256 canvas.

identity.description: The single most important line: species, build, IDENTIFYING FEATURES that must persist across every frame (e.g. Oracle's glowing white eyes).

weapons.description: Weapons present in the canonical reference. Use 'None.' explicitly when the character fights unarmed — the guardrail reads this field to build the banned-substring list.

attackStyle.description: What east_attack depicts. Must not introduce weapons not in `weapons`.

southStyle.description: Optional override for the south (map) pose. Default: neutral idle facing camera.

portraitStyle.description: Optional override for the portrait bust framing.

bannedSubstrings.description: Explicit veto list checked by scripts/pixellab/gen-frame.cjs against the composed pose prompt. Auto-seeded from `weapons: 'None.'`; authors may extend.

sourcePortraitPath.description: Which existing portrait was used as identity anchor.

frames.description: Per-pose provenance. Keys are the 7 canonical pose names from image-policy.md.
